# dBriefd

> dBriefd is a personalized daily news briefing app. Replace endless scrolling with one calm, curated daily brief. Choose your topics (gaming, finance, tech, books, etc.), get short summaries. Read in minutes or listen as podcast-style audio. No ads. No infinite scroll. iOS and Android.

## Name
The official product name is dBriefd.

## Summary
dBriefd delivers one daily brief per day with news summaries tailored to your topics. No noise, no scrolling. Free tier available. Pro plans at launch.

## Contact
- Email: contact@dbriefd.app
- Website: https://dbriefd.app

## Services
- Personalized daily news briefings
- Podcast-style audio briefings
- Topic selection (finance, tech, gaming, books, health, etc.)
- Free and Pro tiers

## What We Do Not Do
- We do not sell ads or user data
- We do not use infinite scroll or recommendation feeds
- We do not display ads

## AI Discovery Files
- Sitemap: https://dbriefd.app/sitemap.xml
